ElementDescription.name: Kennfeld
ElementDescription.Description: 2-D map lookup with bilinear interpolation and clamp extrapolation. Reads a 2-D value table from the active dataset and evaluates it at inputs (x, y).

Parameter.name: parameter_ref
Parameter.Description: Path to the MODEL.CAL_PARAM node relative to @active_dataset (e.g. "group/SpeedTorqueMap").
